query:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE concurrency_gated IS NOT TRUE) AS count,
                       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE concurrency_gated) AS gated_count,
                       MIN(scheduled_for) FILTER (WHERE concurrency_gated IS NOT TRUE)
                           AS oldest_job,
                       MIN(scheduled_for) AS oldest_any
                FROM v2_job_queue
                WHERE tag = $1
                  AND scheduled_for <= NOW() - $2::interval
                  AND running = false
